commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: This has been done in Christ, who said: “Moses wrote about me.” Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: What this means is that salvation will come quickly, and it depends on very few words. There is no need to make a big palaver of it or get involved with the vexation of the works of the law.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: To a compendious formula, because (as it was predicted in another passage) the Lord-that is, Christ "was to make (or utter) a concise word on earth."
